items.title: Former Olympian denies vandalising Washington Reflecting Pool after arrest
items.dek: Davey Hearn says he was simply touching the new paint at the site out of curiosity and did not remove or alter it.
items.body: Davey Hearn says he was simply touching the new paint at the site out of curiosity and did not remove or alter it.

items.title: Backstage at Gorillaz' epic, one-off stadium show: 'The vibe is ridiculous'
items.dek: Damon Albarn, De La Soul and Moonchild Sannelly talk backstage as Gorillaz play their biggest show.

items.title: France bans alcohol at music festival events under red heatwave alert
items.dek: Annual street parties attended by millions ordered to help “preserve” healthcare services in 40C (104F) heat.
items.body: Annual street parties attended by millions ordered to help “preserve” healthcare services in 40C (104F) heat.
